triggers: how do i goldenize and keep it base
how do i goldenize and keep it level 4
entries.response:
To goldenize and keep a Pokémon base/Level 4:

1) Teach the Pokémon a **non-damaging move** (for example: Haze).
2) Let that Pokémon **faint** in the battle.
3) Switch to a **higher-level Pokémon** to defeat the Eevee.

Because the goldenized Pokémon did not deal damage, it will remain base/Level 4.

triggers: what are the current golden day golds
entries.response:
The **current Golden Day golds** are listed in:

• The **pinned messages** in the Trades channel
• The **event announcements** on Discord

Always check those locations for the most up-to-date list.

triggers: how do you make a pokemon golden
how to make a golden pokemon
entries.response:
To goldenize a Pokémon:

• Solve the **community riddle** to find **3 Pokémon and 3 items**.
• Place the Pokémon in the **first three slots** of your roster.
• Attach the **corresponding items** to those Pokémon in the correct order.
• Go to the **Evolution Gym**.
• Defeat the Eevee.

After the battle, the **first Pokémon in your roster becomes golden**.

triggers: can i goldenize on christmas and new years
goldenize on christmas and new years
do christmas and new years count separately
are christmas and new years separate golden days
entries.response:
Yes. **Christmas and New Year’s count as separate Golden Days**.

Even though they usually share the same goldens, you may goldenize your **full allowed amount on each day**.

triggers: how many goldens can i make
how many golds can i make
how many golds for golden day
entries.response:
Golden limits depend on activity:

**Active users**:
• 1 golden per account per Golden Day
• Up to **5 total per Golden Day**
• Applies separately to:
  – Christmas
  – New Year’s
  – August 2nd

**Inactive users**:
• 1 golden per Golden Day
• Total of **2** during Christmas/New Year’s
• **1** on August 2nd

triggers: what days can i make golds
entries.response:
You can goldenize on the following **Golden Days**:

• **Christmas Day** — December 25
• **New Year’s Eve + Day** — December 31 & January 1 (counts as **one** Golden Day)
• **Shrimpy’s Birthday** — August 2

triggers: i won a contest when will i receive my prize
when do i get my contest prize
how long does contest prize take
entries.response:
Contest prize delivery can vary.

• Some prizes are delivered **instantly**
• Others may take **some time**, depending on the contest
• Mods often **transfer prizes directly to your account**

If you haven’t received a trade notification, **check your account** — the prize may already be there.

triggers: what are the best training pokemon
what pokemon should i train with
what pokemon are best for normal training
best pokemon to level with outside training challenge
what are good trainers for regular exp grinding
entries.response:
That’s debatable, but popular choices include **Breloom**, **Blaziken**, **Gallade**, and **Heracross**.

The best option can also depend on the **time of day** you train.

For more detailed breakdowns, see:
https://wiki.tppc.info/Training_Guide

triggers: how many promos can i get
how many power plant prizes can i get
entries.response:
You may receive **one promo / Power Plant prize per account**.

This applies across all **legitimate active accounts**, of which you are allowed **up to 5**.

how to link rpg and forum
entries.response:
It can be a bit tricky.

Follow the instructions in this guide:

triggers: how do i become discord verified
entries.response:
To become **Discord verified**:

• Send your **Discord ID** to a **forum moderator**
• Examples include **Space Cowboy** or **Jigglypuff**

A moderator will handle the verification from there.

New Starter Quests are a way for **new and returning players** who have little or nothing to get started collecting Pokémon.

For more information, see:
https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?t=621060

If your account has been **banned or hacked**, please contact a **moderator** for more information.

You can find a list of **active staff members** here:
https://wiki.tppc.info/TPPC_Staff

If you’ve **forgotten your password or lockdown password**, please contact a **moderator** for assistance.

You can find a list of **active staff members** here:
https://wiki.tppc.info/TPPC_Staff

triggers: why can't i catch more pokemon
entries.response:
TPPC has a **box limit**.

The maximum is **756 Pokémon**.

If your box is full, you’ll need to **trade some Pokémon out** to make space before you can catch more.

triggers: why can't I complete this quest
entries.response: Uh oh! Have you tried putting the **quest Pokémon** in your **box or roster**?

Here are the **stat bonuses** for different Pokémon types:

• **Shiny Pokémon**: +5 to all Stats at all times.
• **Dark Pokémon**: -4 to all Stats during the **day**, +15 to all Stats during the **night**.
• **Golden Pokémon**: +15 to all Stats at all times.

triggers: how do I get golden pokemon
entries.response:
You can get **Golden Pokémon** through:

• **Trading**
• **Buying**
• **Events**
• **Contests**
• **Golden Day**

See here for more information: https://wiki.tppc.info/Golden_Pok%C3%A9mon

Here are the **trade caps** based on rank:

```text
Rank        | Points Required To Unlock | Max Trade Level Allowed
------------|--------------------------|------------------------
Grunt       | 1                        | 2,500
Private     | 10                       | 2,500
Specialist  | 100                      | 2,500
Corporal    | 1,000                    | 2,500
Sergeant    | 10,000                   | 2,500
Lieutenant  | 100,000                  | 2,500
Captain     | 1,000,000                | 4,000
Major       | 10,000,000               | 5,500
Colonel     | 100,000,000              | 7,000
General     | 1,000,000,000            | 8,500
Commander   | 10,000,000,000           | 10,000
```
Maintenance occurs at **5 AM EST** and usually lasts for **1 hour**.

On TPPC:

• **Day** refers to **6 AM - 6 PM** TPPC time.
• **Night** refers to **6 PM - 6 AM** TPPC time.

triggers: what are the power plant perks
entries.response:
Power Plant perks include:

• **Faster egg hatching** (half the usual time)
• **Discounted Pokémon** on the buy page (~33% off)
• **Discounted Team Stat rewards** (~25% off)
• And possibly **additional Team Rewards**!

See here for more info: https://wiki.tppc.info/Power_Plant

triggers: what does UL, b/o, nft, etc mean
entries.response: Type !glossary <term> for a definition of a particular term. Also see https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?p=11516674#post11516674 for more information.

triggers: why didnt I receive the full price for the pokemon I sold
why did my sold pokemon only pay half
how much money do i receive when a pokemon sells
why do sold pokemon give half market value
entries.response:
Once your Pokémon is bought, you will receive **half of its market value** — you have to pay the tax man! Players on the team which is currently in control of the **Power Plant** receive **33% off** on the Buy Pokémon page. This discount only applies to the buyer; the seller still ends up making **half of the market value of the original, non-discounted price**.

See here for more info: https://wiki.tppc.info/Buying_and_Selling_Guide
